nasb.text: But I call God as witness to my soul, that to spare you I did not come again to Corinth.

esv.text: But I call God to witness against me—it was to spare you that I refrained from coming again to Corinth.

cnv.text: 我呼求　神給我作證，我沒有再到哥林多來，是要寬容你們。

ccb.text: 我求上帝为我作证：我没有去哥林多，是为了宽容你们。

csbs.text: 我求告神为我的灵魂见证：我没有再往哥林多去，是因为顾惜你们。
